hero.headline: Stop losing leads after the click.
hero.sub: Revenue systems for service pros and ecommerce brands — built, launched, and optionally managed by one builder.

servicePros.name: Service Pros
servicePros.outcome: Turn site visitors into booked jobs — with follow-up that doesn't depend on you answering every call.

buildIncludes: Brand-matched site that builds trust fast
Lead capture forms wired to your CRM

ecommerceBrands.name: Ecommerce Brands
ecommerceBrands.outcome: Turn traffic into orders — with a store that doesn't leak sales at checkout.

leakage.pain: Missed call on a job site

leakage.fix: Review requests sent after every job
Every page built around one action

diyManaged.hormoziLine: If one saved job or one recovered order pays for the month, the plan pays for itself.
diy: Full Webflow or Shopify access after launch
You change copy, images, and products
No monthly fee required from SWFT

One request at a time; ~2–3 day turnaround
Best if your time is worth more than the fee

benefits.title: Captures demand
benefits.text: Site, forms, and follow-up work as one system.

benefits.title: You own it
benefits.text: Webflow or Shopify in your account. No hostage situations.

benefits.title: One builder
benefits.text: Build, wire, and operate — no agency handoffs.

benefits.title: DIY or done-for-you
benefits.text: Use the CMS yourself or hand it off monthly.

faq.a: No. The build includes capture, routing, and follow-up plumbing. The site is the front door — the system is what happens after someone clicks.

faq.q: What's the difference between Service Pros and Ecommerce?
faq.a: Service Pros are Webflow revenue systems for local and service businesses — leads, bookings, and trust. Ecommerce Brands are Shopify stores built to move product. Same builder, different stack.

faq.q: Do I need the monthly plan?
faq.a: No. One-time builds hand off with full CMS access. Monthly is for owners who want the site plus ongoing edits, monitoring, and GoHighLevel features without doing it themselves.

faq.q: What's included in the build vs monthly?
faq.a: One-time = revenue system installed and handed off. Monthly = site included plus ongoing updates, monitoring, and tiered GHL marketing features.

faq.q: What's the difference between Essential and Growth?
faq.a: Essential covers the core: site, lead capture, basic CRM, and queued updates. Growth adds review automation, follow-up sequences, booking reminders, priority queue, and deeper reporting.

faq.q: What happens after the 30-day post-launch window?
faq.a: One-time builds include 2 free revisions within 30 days of launch. After that, contact for current revision rates.

faq.q: Can I edit the site myself?
faq.a: Yes. Every build ships in your Webflow or Shopify account with full CMS access.
Service sites typically launch in 6–8 weeks. Ecommerce builds run 6–10 weeks. Monthly update requests ship in ~2–3 business days.
Yes. Billing runs on a 31-day cycle. Pause anytime — unused days stay on your account for when you return.

sections.path: Run it yourself or I run it for you
